meaning: n.环球网,网,蛛丝,蹼,翼手,织物,圈套,卷筒纸;vi.使陷入罗网,形成网;vt.织蜘蛛网于,使落入圈套
examples: You need an up-to-date Web browser.
I found the information on the Web.
The handbook is available on the Web.
Web sites can bring customers and credibility, even to young entrepreneurs like the Steeds.
Aaron, 25, says the Web site has helped Meathead, based in San Luis Obispo, Calif.
